title: acranthera involucrata
intro: Acranthera involucrata, also known as the velvet flower, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Acranthera involucrata has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
